action: cert renew with missing entry (list first)

error.message: entry_name 参数缺失，无法执行续签

commands: uv run certmanctl --endpoint http://127.0.0.1:8000 cert list
uv run certmanctl --endpoint http://127.0.0.1:8000 cert renew --entry-name <entry_name>
next_steps: 先运行 cert list 查看所有可用 entry
确认目标 entry 名后替换 <entry_name> 执行 cert renew
